reference: Yes, ma'am, it is better and advisable to give the booster now, ma'am. Antibiotics do not interfere with the immunity for the diphtheria, pertussis, and tetanus vaccine, so kindly proceed with administering the vaccine.
text: Yes, Mom, it is better and advisable to give the booster now. Mom, antibiotics do not interfere with the immunity for the diphtheria, pertussis, and tetanus vaccines, so kindly proceed with administering the vaccine.
